arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's FA Cup clash between Manchester United and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ineos are about to show Man United their true colours with £54m Harry Kane transfer decision
arts.sum: Man United have been heavily linked with Harry Kane in the past when he was playing for Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has one-word verdict after Ruben Amorim's second brutal decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's relationship with Ruben Amorim quickly deteriorated as he was left out of all but one of his matchday squads since giving a bombshell revealing he wanted to leave Manchester United in December

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy disagrees with Gary Neville over Man Utd assessment
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker and interim boss Ruud van Nistelrooy returns to Old Trafford on Friday night looking to turn around his fortunes in charge of Leicester City

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has hinted at his Man United job security and Ineos must act fast
arts.sum: Manchester United find themselves in a desperate period but surely Ruben Amorim's hints at his job being in peril are premature?

arts.ttl: Man Utd Now Eyeing Summer Move for ‘Exceptional’ 21 y/o Striker
arts.sum: Manchester United are in need of a striker and they could look to the Premier League to secure a target

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba has already given Man United transfer return verdict amid invitation message
arts.sum: Paul Pogba has previously had his say on a return to Manchester United after returning to Old Trafford in 2016

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'contacted' by Thomas Tuchel as Man United attacker receives firm England answer
arts.sum: England boss Thomas Tuchel reportedly informs Marcus Rashford whether he sees him as part of his Three Lions plans moving forward.

arts.ttl: David de Gea and Erik ten Hag point made as Andre Onana sent Man United 'mistakes' message
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Thomas Fair, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: The Manchester United goalkeeper continues to be under scrutiny as Ruben Amorim's side toil in the bottom half of the table.

arts.ttl: Amorim keen to reunite with €60m Sporting star Quenda at Man Utd
arts.sum: Born in Guinea-Bissau before moving to Portugal as a child, Quenda broke into the Sporting first team earlier this season with Amorim deploying the teenager at right wing-back. Ruben Amorim is keen to bring Geovany Quenda to Manchester United, The Transfers Podcast understands.
